nasb.text: They shall have no inheritance among their countrymen; the Lord is their inheritance, as He promised them.

esv.text: They shall have no inheritance among their brothers; the Lord is their inheritance, as he promised them.

cnv.text: 利未人在兄弟中必沒有產業，耶和華就是他們的產業，正如耶和華應許他們的。

ccb.text: 他们在众支派中没有自己的产业，因为耶和华是他们的产业，这是祂的应许。
